name: market-research-quality
description: Tests completeness and quality of market research output

criteria.name: has_executive_summary
criteria.check: output contains Executive Summary with 3 or fewer sentences

criteria.name: has_market_sizing
criteria.check: output contains TAM, SAM, and SOM with $ values

criteria.name: has_competitors
criteria.description: Identifies at least 3 competitors with analysis
criteria.check: output contains competitor table or list with 3+ entries

criteria.name: has_customer_profile
criteria.check: output contains customer profile or ICP section

criteria.name: has_opportunity_score
criteria.check: output contains Opportunity Score with X/10 rating

criteria.name: has_recommendation
criteria.check: output contains Go or No-Go or Investigate recommendation

criteria.name: no_unsourced_claims
criteria.check: claims are qualified with confidence levels or sources
